events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr, born Richard Starkey on July 7, 1940, achieved international fame as the drummer for The Beatles and later as a successful solo artist.

angles.name: The Beatle's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! From the driving force behind The Beatles to his enduring solo career, what's your favourite Ringo moment or track?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Sir Brian Harold May, born July 19, 1947, is an English musician, astrophysicist, and the iconic lead guitarist of the rock band Queen.

angles.name: Queen's Guitar God
angles.copy: Sending a huge Happy 79th Birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May! What's the Queen song where his guitar solo absolutely blows you away?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, born July 26, 1943, is an English singer, songwriter, and film producer, best known as the flamboyant frontman of The Rolling Stones.

angles.name: Jagger's Enduring Energy
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger! Six decades of rock 'n' roll energy – what's your favourite Rolling Stones track that still gets you moving?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first music video ever aired.

angles.name: The Day Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with that iconic first video. Did video really kill the radio star, or did it just give us more ways to enjoy the music? We know the answer!

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. What's the first song or artist that comes to mind when you think of that iconic festival?

events.title: 49 years since the death of Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977, at his Graceland home in Memphis, Tennessee.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day 49 years ago, the music world lost the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley. His legacy lives on. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Christine Ellen Hynde, born September 7, 1951, is an American-British singer, songwriter, and the enduring frontwoman of The Pretenders.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude defined a generation. What's your go-to Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: William John Paul Gallagher, born September 21, 1972, is an English singer and songwriter, best known as the lead vocalist of Oasis and later Beady Eye.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! From Oasis anthems to his solo hits, his voice is unmistakable. What's your favourite Liam tune?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From the iconic theme tunes to the gadgets and the cars, what's your favourite element of the 007 universe?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Winston Ono Lennon, born October 9, 1940, was an English singer, songwriter, and peace activist who gained worldwide fame as a co-founder of The Beatles.

angles.name: Imagine John Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His music and message continue to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon song?
